Review.title: Review
Review.description: A user review for a specific store.

storeId.description: The unique identifier for the store (e.g., store name or ID).

userId.description: The UID of the user who wrote the review.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userPhoto.description: The photo URL of the user.

comment.description: The text content of the review.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the review was created.
